title: Learning Force-Regulated Manipulation with a Low-Cost Tactile-Force-Controlled Gripper
description: TF-Gripper is a low-cost tactile-sensing parallel-jaw gripper, paired with RETAF, a framework for high-frequency reactive force adaptation in robotic manipulation.

title: Moving Out: Physically-grounded Human-AI Collaboration
description: Moving Out explores physically-grounded human-AI collaboration through a new benchmark environment and BASS, a method to enhance agent adaptability.

title: CLASS: Contrastive Learning via Action Sequence Supervision for Robot Manipulation
description: CLASS utilizes a supervised contrastive learning method that leverages action sequence similarity to learn robust behavioral representations for robotic manipulation under visual shifts.

title: O³Afford: One-Shot 3D Object-to-Object Affordance Grounding for Generalizable Robotic Manipulation
description: O³Afford develops a novel one-shot 3D object-to-object affordance learning approach that integrates point cloud representations with VLMs for generalizable manipulation.

title: Diff-DAgger: Uncertainty Estimation with Diffusion Policy for Robotic Manipulation
description: Diff-DAgger leverages diffusion policy training objectives to accurately estimate uncertainty and actively seek expert help during interactive imitation learning.
